    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AndCondition
    Condition that evaluates to true only if all contained conditions evaluate to true.
    AndNode
     
    ConcreteAbstractSyntaxTreeNode
     
    ConcreteCompiledInstruction
     
    ConcreteCompiledOperand
     
    ConcreteCompiledProgram
     
    ConcreteCompiler
    Concrete implementation of ICompiler for the Registermaschine.
    ConcreteExecutionContext
    Default implementation of IExecutionContext used by the runtime system of the Registermaschine.
    ConcreteInstructionNode
     
    ConcreteInstructionSet
    Concrete implementations of IInstructionSet.
    ConcreteLabelNode
     
    ConcreteLexer
    Concrete implementation of ILexer for the Registermaschine.
    ConcreteOperandNode
     
    ConcreteParser
    Concrete parser implementation for the Registermaschine.
    ConcreteSyntaxTree
     
    ConcreteToken
     
    ConditionBuilder
     
    ConditionLexer
     
    ConditionMacroParser
     
    ConditionNode
     
    ConditionParser
     
    ConditionToken
     
    ConditionToken.Type
     
    CoreConfig
    Core configuration constants and global settings for the Registermaschine.
    CoreConfigParser
    Core configuration parser for the Registermaschine.
    EqualsZeroCondition
    Condition that evaluates to true if the IExecutionContext's zero flag is set.
    Executor
    The Executor is responsible for executing a compiled program on the Registermaschine runtime environment.
    InstructionParser
     
    LeafNode
     
    LessThanZeroCondition
    Condition that evaluates to true if the IExecutionContext's negative flag is set and the zero flag is not set.
    MacroNode
     
    NotCondition
    Condition that evaluates to the logical negation of an inner condition.
    NotNode
     
    OrCondition
    Condition that evaluates to true if at least one contained condition evaluates to true.
    OrNode
     
    Pipeline
    Central compilation pipeline for the Registermaschine.
    Pipeline.ParseStage
    Represents the parsing stage in the pipeline.
    Pipeline.TokenStage
    Represents the tokenisation stage in the pipeline.
    SettingsParser
     
    XmlConstants
